# First Packet

objective: establish RepoKernel continuity for Starter L1
intent: Create a minimal L1 RepoKernel project kernel
source: reviewed SeedSpec and authorized ProjectModel inputs
boundary: proposal_only; staging is not target apply
first_safe_action: review staged RepoKernel proposal and REVIEW_ME_FIRST before any target write
authority: proposal_only

## Source References

- No ProjectModel source references supplied.

## First Safe Action

Review this staged packet and compare it with existing project state before
any apply gate is considered.

## Learning Intake

If review discovers a reusable correction, record it as a proposed memory
delta with source, boundary, expected next-action improvement and validation
needed. Do not promote it into project rules or skills without review.

memory delta: none accepted yet; review may propose one with evidence.

## Clarity Intake

If review discovers dirty, unclear, duplicate or stale files, classify them
before acting. Record proposed cleanup as keep, commit, document, archive,
ignore, delete-candidate or ask-owner. Destructive cleanup requires a gate.
